sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ الْأَطْفَالُ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ مَشْيًا عَلَى الْأَقْدَامِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su išla u školu pješice.
sentences.translationEn: The children went to school on foot.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمَدْرَسَةُ غُرْفَةً صَغِيرَةً فِي الْقَرْيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Škola je bila mala soba u selu.
sentences.translationEn: The school was a small room in the village.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الطُّلَّابُ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ وَكَتَبُوا عَلَى أَلْوَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su sjedili na podu i pisali na pločicama.
sentences.translationEn: The students sat on the floor and wrote on tablets.

sentences.translation: Učili su čitanje, pisanje i računanje.
sentences.translationEn: They learned reading, writing, and arithmetic.
